language.entry: You must set a new password before continuing.
Your password is managed by your organization's LDAP/SSO directory, not by this app. Contact your administrator if you need to change it.
People with a role on this strategy -- click to view Members
Goals on track{{periodSuffix}} -- click to view Report
Objectives on track{{periodSuffix}} -- click to view Report
Initiatives on track{{periodSuffix}} -- click to view Report
Used in the organization's URL, e.g. strtalign.com/{{slug}}
The organization's first Admin can change this after logging in.
Serve this organization at the bare domain root
A new random password will be generated and the user will be required to set their own on next login.
Share this password with the user securely. It will not be shown again.
Changing the slug changes this organization's login URL. Any previously-shared login links will stop working; existing logged-in sessions are unaffected.

Start a new strategy for a department or the university, run it through SWOT and drafting, and track anything still in progress, including strategies you've been invited to participate in. Once a strategy is deployed, it moves to the Strategy Console for everyone assigned to it.
This will allow the strategy to proceed to the Deployed state once all required approvers have approved.
No achievement data available for any period
Bars show achievements vs target ({{threshold}} per initiative)
Coloured tags show each department's contribution for the selected period
Achievement recording will be re-enabled for this year.
No new achievements can be added for this year across all initiatives.
Ownership transferred, you are now an Editor
Make {{name}} the new Owner? You will become an Editor.
Type name or email to search...
Once all required approvers approve, the strategy will be deployed.
Some items are incomplete — review the highlighted items before advancing.
Collaborate on this strategy's SWOT analysis
The SWOT workflow is complete. Revisit the vote results or word board any time for reference.
Run a guided SWOT analysis with your team, vote on the strongest ideas, and let AI suggest focus areas and goals to review before drafting this strategy.
Only possible if it has no goals assigned — move or delete its goals first.
Threshold value (minimum achievements for green status)
Select the {{label}} initiative this maps to
Map this initiative to a {{label}} initiative
Has recorded achievements — cannot be edited or deleted
Select a specific {{yearLabel}} above, or use View all to add for an existing period
AI suggestion unavailable — enter a KPI manually or skip it
Map this objective to at least one {{label}} objective
Search any initiative in this plan — no need to open the tree.
Needs a KPI before you can log an achievement
Select a specific {{yearLabel}} above to log achievements here
No goals in this strategy yet.
Use "Propose a Different One" below to submit your alternative.
Edit the title/description above with your own goal instead.
Edit the title/description above with your proposed alternative, then submit back for more consideration.
Work with your fellow owners and editors to run a SWOT analysis, vote on the strongest ideas, and let AI propose focus areas and goals you can review and finalize into a draft strategy.
Every current Owner and Editor on this strategy will be invited to participate.
Waiting for the strategy owner to start the SWOT analysis.
Voting is closed — AI is generating suggested focus areas from the top-ranked words in the background. This page checks automatically and will move on once it's ready.
Waiting on your Editors — you'll finalize the draft yourself once they're done.
Your review is in — waiting for the rest of the team.
Waiting for the strategy owner to finalize the draft.
Done! Use the links below any time to revisit the vote results or the word board.
Generation started — this can take a minute or two
Could not start generation — try again
What does this organization do well? (internal)
Where does this organization fall short? (internal)
What external trends or openings could this organization pursue?
What external risks or pressures could hurt this organization?
Enter a word and a one-sentence justification
Add at least {{min}} words to both Strength and Weakness before moving to external factors
Add at least {{min}} words to {{quadrant}} before continuing
Work through Strengths and Weaknesses (what's happening inside the organization) before moving on to Opportunities and Threats (external factors).
You must add enough Strengths and Weaknesses before continuing to Opportunities and Threats.
Type a word or short phrase — synonyms will appear as you type
One sentence: why is this a good description?
Review your SWOT analysis before submitting.
Each quadrant needs at least {{min}} words before you can submit.
You won't be able to add more words after this.
Rank your top {{count}} words in each quadrant. Your 1st choice carries the most weight. Options are sorted by how many people submitted them.
marks a combined option for words WordNet auto-detected as synonyms (its count is the sum of all of them); a
tag marks an individual word that has one or more detected synonyms elsewhere in the list.
No words were submitted for this quadrant.
You won't be able to change your vote after this.
Prefers a different area — see their proposal under "Team-proposed alternative areas" below.

As owner, you make the final call on every suggested (and proposed alternative) area and goal. Each Editor's review is shown below the original AI suggestion — click "Use this" to adopt one of their versions as your starting point, then edit it further if you like.
Each decision you make below is saved right away. Feel free to close this page and come back later — nothing is final until you click "Finalize & Create Draft Strategy" below.
This area still needs a final decision before you can finalize
This goal still needs a final decision before you can finalize
Add a Goal to this Area
This creates real vision areas and goals from your decisions and completes the SWOT workflow.
Your progress is saved — come back anytime to finish
Use "Propose a Different Area" below to submit your alternative.
You're the strategy owner — this is a preview of what your Editors are reviewing. You'll make the final call yourself on the Finalization page once every Editor has submitted their review.
Your choices below are locked in and can no longer be changed. The strategy owner will finalize the areas and goals once every reviewer has submitted.

AI generated these focus areas and goals from your team's top-voted SWOT words. For each area and goal, choose whether to reject it, approve it (with or without edits), or propose a different area instead.
Each choice you make above is saved right away. Feel free to close this page and come back later — nothing is final until you click "Submit My Review" below.
This area still needs a decision before you can submit
This goal still needs a decision before you can submit
Propose a Goal for this Area
You haven't proposed any alternative areas.
You won't be able to change your review after this.

A summary of your logged achievements and this year's deployed goals. Achievements are logged from the Strategy Tree when you record them against an initiative, each one is tagged there with the evaluation category (and optionally a goal) it counts toward for your annual portfolio.
No achievements logged yet, record one from a strategy's initiative tree
No deployed goals for this {{yearLabel}} yet
Generated by the achievement-recording tool, not editable
Your annual evaluation for this cycle is locked

It has already been submitted or concluded, so achievements can no longer be added or re-tagged for it. You can add achievements again if your head returns it for revision, or once the next cycle opens.
Ask an admin to configure portfolio categories for your title before recording achievements here.
Fixed by the achievement-recording tool that generated this achievement
Which annual-portfolio category this achievement counts toward
Which specific criteria within the category, used later during the annual evaluation
URL to evidence. Public link is prefered, but even a link to the evidence in your cloud storage open to public is fine
URL to certificate, publication, or evidence
Goal linking is only available to the achievement's author.
You don't have a strategy you can currently add achievements to.
Which strategy is this achievement for?
This strategy has no objectives yet.
Needs a KPI before you can log an achievement
Select a specific year to log achievements here

Review each achievement logged this {{yearLabel}}, confirm which category, criteria, and (optionally) goal it counts toward, give yourself a self-assessed rank per category and one overall rank for your annual goals, then submit for your head's review. Every criteria and goal needs either an achievement or an explicit "nothing to report." Comments and reflection are required for every category, for your annual goals, and for an overall General Final Summary Statement, and optional for each criteria, your head may return the evaluation to you once for another round of edits before their final review.
Select a {{yearLabel}} to view your evaluation
This also removes it from your portfolio.
Now select a criterion within the new category to complete the reassignment.
Select criteria in the new category
Give every category a self-assessment rank.
Give your Annual Goals section an overall self-assessment rank.
Tag every achievement logged this year to a criteria.
Give every criteria either an achievement or mark it "Nothing to report".
Give every goal either an achievement or mark it "Nothing to report".
Add your comments and reflection for every category.
Add your comments and reflection for your Annual Goals.
Add a General Final Summary Statement.
Log at least one achievement for: {{criteria}}.
You can change the category, criteria, or goal mapping of any achievement using the dropdowns below.
No achievements tagged to this criteria yet
You reported nothing for this criteria
No achievements tagged to this criteria
Not yet linked to a specific criteria
Your head returned this evaluation for another round, update your self-assessment, add any achievements you missed, and comment on the Next Cycle Goals below, then resubmit.
Click Submit for Head Review to see exactly what's still needed before you can submit.
Submitted, waiting for your head to complete their review.
You refused to sign this evaluation
Please provide a rationale for refusing to sign this evaluation:
Type your full name below to sign and confirm this evaluation.
Required: your own comments and reflection
Optional: your own comments and reflection on this section
Employee reported nothing for this goal
No achievements tagged to this goal
No rubric defined for this goal yet
This score is generated to help the evaluator assess the evaluation level of this criterion/goal, and may not necessarily reflect the score the employee would or should get.
Click the words in the rubric columns below that best describe the achievement level shown above. Skip words that don't carry meaning (prepositions, articles, etc.), they shouldn't affect the score.
No data available for this employee.
Note areas where the employee can grow (AI will suggest goals from this)
AI is generating suggested goals in the background. This page checks automatically and will show them once ready.
e.g., Develop advanced statistical analysis skills
You've already recorded the maximum of {{max}} achievements for this criterion this {{yearLabel}}
This clears any uploaded files and draft for this criterion.
Generate the AI draft (Step 2) before you can save
You can close this window any time and come back later

Your uploaded files and generated draft are saved on the server, you don't need to wait here while the AI works. Reopen this same criterion later and pick up where you left off; the Save Achievement button unlocks once your draft is ready.
Local folder path (a reference note for you only, never read by the system)
AI is drafting from your uploaded files, it's safe to close this window and come back later. This checks automatically and will show the draft once ready.
This becomes part of the permanent record and can't be edited, if something's wrong, upload corrected files and regenerate above.
Generate the AI draft above (Step 2) before you can review and save this achievement.
Your own comments on these student evaluations and on the AI-generated review above.
Upload ALL your course evaluation files for this {{yearLabel}} to your own cloud storage (Google Drive, OneDrive, etc.), make sure it is open to your {{headTitle}}, and paste that link here.
Generating draft, this can take a minute or two
Review the annual goals your department head has proposed. Accept them as-is or with edits, or send the whole set back for more consideration, you can go back and forth until you're both satisfied.
No goals have been set for you yet this {{yearLabel}}
Your department head is still preparing your goals
Your department head has submitted goals for your review
Sent back to your department head for more consideration
These goals will be deployed as your active goals for this {{yearLabel}}. Type your full name below to sign and confirm.
Goals accepted, signed, and deployed for the {{yearLabel}}

Set annual improvement goals for a direct report. Enter your notes on their strengths and areas for improvement, generate AI-assisted suggestions, then review each one before submitting for the employee's review.
No direct reports found, you must head a department to set goals
Select a {{yearLabel}} and employee to view their goals
Saved automatically. Private to you, never shown to the employee or anyone else.
No goals yet — generate AI suggestions or add one manually
The employee sent these goals back for more consideration
Edit, add, or remove goals below based on their feedback, then resubmit.
Next Cycle Goals found from a prior evaluation

This employee has goals drafted and approved during a prior Annual Evaluation that haven't been assigned to a cycle yet. Deselect any you don't want, or choose "Not Now" to start this year's goals from scratch, these will still be offered again next time.

For every direct report, checks whether they have a concluded evaluation (signed by you, and signed or refused by them) from the year below with unassigned Next Cycle Goals, and no goals set yet for the year you're deploying to. When both hold, those goals are deployed automatically, employees who already have goals for that year, or have no eligible goals to reuse, are skipped and reported below.
The year with no goals yet
The year to check for concluded evaluations
Already has goals for that year
What the head should see to rate this goal as Unsatisfactory
What the head should see to rate this goal as Meets Expectations
What the head should see to rate this goal as Exceeds Expectations
Deployed goals from the prior evaluation
Review every goal above before submitting

Rate each direct report's achievements against every criterion, give an overall category rank, then an overall annual performance rank. Optionally return the evaluation to the employee once for another round of edits before you Sign and Submit, which sends it to them for signature or refusal.
Returned to employee for review and update
Complete the highlighted fields below before submitting
No direct reports have an evaluation for this year yet
Employee reported nothing for this criteria
No rubric defined for this criterion
Not linked to a specific criteria
Return this evaluation to the employee?
They'll be able to edit their self-assessment, add missed achievements, and comment on the Next Cycle Goals, then resubmit. This can only be done once.
Return to Employee for Review and Update

Rank every category, criteria, and goal, plus an overall rank for the Annual Goals section, fill in comments for every category and the Annual Goals section, and add at least one Next Cycle Goal before submitting.
Click Sign and Submit to highlight exactly which fields are still missing.
Waiting for the employee to review and resubmit their self-assessment.
Signed and submitted by you as {{name}}. Waiting for the employee to sign or refuse.
Signed and submitted by you. Waiting for the employee to sign or refuse.
This evaluation is concluded. Signed by {{name}}.
Type your full name below to sign and submit this evaluation. It will then go to the employee for their signature or refusal.

Read-only status of every Annual Evaluation across your organization hierarchy, every department you head directly, plus every department under any org group you head. To rate an evaluation, use Team Annual Evaluations instead.
No evaluations found in your organization hierarchy for this year
Employee refused to sign this evaluation
These labels are used throughout the app in place of the university-specific terms they default to, so the system reads naturally for any organization it's deployed at.
This will permanently delete the strategy and all its members.
Delete this group? Departments and sub-groups will be unassigned.
Title of the person who leads this group
Leave blank for a top-level group
Title of the department head, e.g. Chair, Coordinator
This will block new achievements for all initiatives in this year.
Initiatives/measurements and Annual Evaluations for this {{yearLabel}} are scoped to this strategy's cycle
No main {{label}} yet. Create one to start planning.
e.g. Office of Research Strategic Plan
This will also delete all assessment periods and themes for this cycle.
Select the owner for the main {{label}}
A main {{label}} will be created automatically for this cycle.
Used by the app itself (e.g. the 'Other' custom-type flow or the Teaching Evaluations tool), can be renamed but not deactivated
It stays available on any achievement that already uses it.
Shown in the "Type" dropdown wherever an achievement is recorded. Deactivated types stay visible on achievements that already use them, but can't be selected for new ones.

Import reference data (e.g. Early Alert reports) into the central repository. Criteria Info Tools, assigned per-criterion in Category Management, read this data back for heads during Annual Evaluation review. Re-running an import for the same type/term replaces the prior data for that term rather than duplicating it.
No import form is registered for this reader yet.
(Optional -- lets the user manually add an achievement for this criterion)
(Optional -- lets the evaluator pull in reference info while reviewing this criterion)
These labels apply to every category under this title, and to the final overall rank given during an evaluation cycle.
What data/evidence the faculty member must provide for this criteria
What the head should see to rate this criteria as Unsatisfactory
What the head should see to rate this criteria as Meets Expectations
What the head should see to rate this criteria as Exceeds Expectations
Once an employee records this many achievements through this tool for this criterion in a {{yearLabel}}, the tool is disabled for them for that year.

When on, the employee cannot submit their Annual Evaluation self-assessment without at least one achievement recorded through this tool for this criterion -- this overrides 'Nothing to report' for that criterion.
Optional -- what the employee sees on the button for this criterion. Leave blank to use the default: "{{name}}".
Enter what the head will see on the button
Shown to the head as the button label for this criterion -- there's no default, so pick something clear (e.g. 'Early Alert Data').
Select which imported data type this pulls from
Which type of imported data (from the Data Repository admin console) this tool will show for employees of this criterion's title.
Fixed once assigned -- unassign and re-add this tool to point it at a different repository type.
Only concluded evaluations (signed by the head, and signed or refused by the employee) appear here.
No concluded evaluations for this year yet
Search users by name, email, title, or department…
A user must have a department, an org group, or both.
Click or drag a CSV file here
The department column expects a department code (e.g. ENG, CS), not the full name. The orgGroup column expects an org group's title, exactly as it appears in the Org Groups admin page.
Every user needs a department, an org group, or both — a row with neither will be skipped.
Existing users (matched by email) will be updated. New emails will be created with a default password.
